name: jemalloc
description: jemalloc is a general purpose malloc(3) implementation that emphasizes fragmentation avoidance and scalable concurrency support. Tebako fork for DwarFS: builds without je_ prefix on all platforms for Folly compatibility. The posix_memalign conflict with GCC's mm_malloc.h is resolved by: (1) guarding posix_memalign declaration in jemalloc source template with _MM_MALLOC_H checks, and (2) adding compiler flags to Folly to allow exception specifier mismatch.
